Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Book of Eternal Night]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — The Book of Eternal Night is the first book, crafted by Akura Malice for her successor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — The Book of Eternal Night surrounds Mercy when she uses its power.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The Book of Eternal Night is an item held by Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy pulls four techniques from the Book of Eternal Night.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Book of Eternal Night is a Divine Treasure with spinning script on its cover.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — The Book of Eternal Night contains techniques considered powerful enough for a future Monarch by Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — The Book of Eternal Night has at least five pages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Book of Eternal Night is an idealized version of the Path of Eternal Night created by Akura Malice.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — The Book of Eternal Night is a Divine Treasure that materializes over Mercy.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Book of Eternal Night is an idealized version of Malice's Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Book of Eternal Night can be modified.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Book of Eternal Night contains pages that require specific abilities to access.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy manifested her Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — The Book of Eternal Night is a violet tome with spinning scripts on the cover.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — The Book of Eternal Night contains pages used for training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — The Book of Eternal Night contains Malice's will and memories on every page.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — The Book of Eternal Night contains pages that are separate constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — The Book of Eternal Night is compatible with Mercy's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The Book of Eternal Night is an object Lindon can separate Mercy from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy is adapting to the Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Mercy was studying her Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — The sixth page of the Book of Eternal Night was one room used to prepare Mercy for Archlord and teach her a technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Malice's instincts were absorbed from the Book of Eternal Night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Book of Eternal Night contains the authority Mercy borrowed from her mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The Book of Eternal Night was meant to contain Malice’s ideal Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The Book of Eternal Night must end at Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The seventh page of the Book of Eternal Night is a battlefield where Mercy's will and spirit suffuse.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy uses the resources in her Book of Eternal Night to fuel her growth.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
